textByHash.93ab0d0b2902b79add52e4c14c00198707e696dc: There aren't many guards in it.
textByHash.42d97daab48fddf6fb3010b71650111181ae641c: We don't have an army, you see.
textByHash.4b4d00c052b454556805f905d490fedde2898dc8: Fairly pleasant, though it gets cold in the winter.
textByHash.1f044082bc1ad466d4917934346ea537f8c4c92b: Thank you for finding my plates for me. Did you find everyone's belongings?
textByHash.478e927f3b156497a577187b35dc54c9d1e2203f: You're more than welcome to it, for getting our belongings back.
textByHash.d5c19213c07117375b2eb2714d24c0e753f1a7bf: Kingdom? Etceteria is ruled by a Queen and we don't approve of you.
